$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/macros/add-ent.text:
\define entriesTiddler()$:/indexer/data/$(currentTiddler)$ \define tempSelectTid()$:/temp/indexer/$(currentTiddler)$ \define alphabet()ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ \define loadEntries() <$let letter={{{[get[letter]]:else[[A]]}}}> <$list filter="[!match[*all]]"variable=ignore> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]enlist-input[]]:filter[prefix]+[format:titlelist[]join[ ]]}}}/> <$list filter="[match[*all]]"variable=ignore> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]]}}}/> \end \define saveAction() <$list filter="[!is[tiddler]]"variable=ignore> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>type="text/plain"tags="$:/tags/Indexer/Entries"/> <$list filter="[!match[*all]]"variable=ignore> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]enlist-input[]sentencecase[]prefix][get[text]enlist-input[]!prefix]+[sort[title]format:titlelist[]unique[]join[ ]]}}}/> <$list filter="[match[*all]]"variable=ignore> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{{[get[text]enlist-input[]sentencecase[]sort[title]format:titlelist[]unique[]join[ ]]}}}/> <> \end \define lbracket()[ \define validateEntries() <$list filter='[get[text]enlist-input[]]:filter[split[]nth[]sentencecase[]!match!match]+[join[, ]]:filter[!match[*all]]'> ''Invalid entries'': //<$text text={{!!title}}/>//
''Warning'': The current index selected is for words beginning with the letter <$text text=<>/>. Use double brackets for compound phrases (which have spaces). Entries started with other letters are invalid and will not be saved! \end <$select tiddler=<>field=letter actions=<>default=A> <$list filter='[split[]enlist-input[]]*all'> Choose a letter or all at once <$let targetLetter={{{[get[letter]]:else[[A]]}}}defaultEntries={{{[get[text]enlist-input[]prefixformat:titlelist[]join[ ]]}}}> <$edit-text tiddler=<>field=text default=<>placeholder=''class=kk-indexer-edit/> <$button actions=<>> Save <>

$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/macros/make-in.text:
\define entriesTiddler()$:/indexer/data/$(__entriesTiddler__)$ \define livepreviewTid()$:/config/Indexer/live-preview \define alphabet()ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ \define make-index(scope:[all[tiddlers]!is[system]] fields:title,tags,caption entriesTiddler stateTiddler) <$let state="$:/temp/indexer/list/$(currentTiddler)$"tempTid={{{[<__stateTiddler__>!is[blank]thenaddsuffix[/$stateTiddler$]else]}}}hasEntry="[get[text]enlist-input[]] +[uppercase[]prefix]"titlePrefix={{{[get[text]else[A]]}}}letterFilter="[uppercase[]prefix]"outputFilter="$scope$ +[search:$fields$:literal]"selStyle="[matchthen[font-weight:bold;]]">
<$list filter="[split[]filter]"> <$list filter="[get[text]enlist-input[]prefix{!!title}]:filter[subfilternth[]]+[nth[]]"variable=null> <$button class="tc-btn-invisible kk-indexer-btn"> ]}}}><$text text={{!!title}}/> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>text={{!!title}}/> >title="back to top"class=kk-indexer-locator>{{$:/core/images/fold-button}}
>> <$list filter="[get[text]enlist-input[]sort[title]]:filter[subfilter]:filter[subfilternth[]]">
<$text text={{!!title}}/>
<$list filter=<>>
get[text]match[yes]then{!!text}]}}}><$link/> <>
\end \define moreInformation() <$list filter="[get[moreinfo]match[yes]]"variable=ignore> //<$text text={{{[{!!title}links[]count[]!match[0]addsuffix[ links]][{!!title}backlinks[]count[]!match[0]addsuffix[ backlinks]][{!!title}tags[]count[]!match[0]addsuffix[ tags]][{!!title}tagging[]count[]!match[0]addsuffix[ tagging]]+[join[, ]]}}}/>// \end

$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/readme.text:
; Indexer
Create subject/author indexes. Create custom type of indexes e.g. places, objects, etc.

;Code and demo
For learning plugin features, syntax, tutorial and examples see the plugin demo and code pages

* Demo: https://kookma.github.io/TW-Indexer/
* Code: https://github.com/kookma/TW-Indexer

$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/ControlPane.caption: Indexer
$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/ControlPane.text:
These settings let you customise the behaviour of Indexer plugin.

---

;Show Indexer setting in more sidebar
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/ControlPanel/Settings" tag="$:/tags/MoreSideBar"> Show setting in more sidebar</$checkbox>

; Display Subject Index
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/subject-index" tag="$:/tags/AdvancedSearch"> Enable Subject Index in $:/AdvancedSearch</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/subject-index" tag="$:/tags/SideBar"> Enable Subject Index in Sidebar</$checkbox>


; Enable live preview
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/Indexer/live-preview" field="text" checked="yes"> Enable live raw text preview</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/Indexer/live-preview" field="moreinfo" checked="yes"> Enable more information</$checkbox>

;List of index entries (categories)
:<$list 
   filter="[all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/Indexer/Entries]]"
   template="$:/core/ui/ListItemTemplate" />

$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/subject-ind.caption: Subject Index
$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/subject-ind.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/indexer/macros/make-index
<$macrocall $name=make-index scope=[all[tiddlers]!is[system]] fields="title, tags, caption, text"entriesTiddler=subject/>

<small>
[[Edit index entries|$:/plugins/kookma/indexer/ui/subject-entries]]
